title: Shielded transaction builder and broadcaster
description: Implement send_payment(to_address, amount, memo) using zcash transaction builder. Fetch Sapling parameters (spend.params, output.params). Sign with spending key. Broadcast via lightwalletd SendTransaction RPC. Return txid.
close_reason: Done: Shielded tx builder+broadcaster in wallet/src/tx_builder.rs and payment.rs. Commit bc8db12 feat(wallet): shielded tx builder. send_payment() wired into /pay.
